payload.body: Domain seed for maevtica; contributes only domain knowledge.

payload.body: Unexplored region competing for Studio attention.
payload.title: Fragile invariance under representation changes

payload.body: Initial domain assumption; it is disposable if later artifacts defeat it.
payload.title: Cross-paradigm claims must survive ablation

payload.body: Assume the Studio may be flawed. Attempt to prove that it adds complexity without epistemic gain.
payload.title: Does the current Studio organization produce measurable epistemic advantages over simpler workflows?

payload.body: The Studio may merely generate plausible-looking artifacts while adding overhead.
payload.title: Null: Studio has no significant advantage over simpler workflows

payload.body: preserves state transitions and reduces accidental forgetting
payload.title: Component under test: Historian

payload.body: selects frontiers and allocates attention
payload.title: Component under test: Planner

payload.body: detects stagnation and process failures

payload.body: makes process inspectable for humans

payload.body: forces scarce-resource competition

payload.body: preserves links between artifacts

payload.body: keeps falsification pressure visible
payload.title: Component under test: Counterexample Graph

payload.body: mutates the organization based on reputation
payload.title: Component under test: Agent Evolution
